description: Bring the family for an engaging afternoon of reading, crafts, and interactive storytelling featuring "The Serpent and the Wings of Night" by Carissa Broadbent. Perfect for readers of all ages. Hosted at Parnassus Books.

title: Special Panel: Emily Henry
author: Emily Henry
description: Catch bestselling author Emily Henry on panel at San Diego Comic-Con! Discussing "Funny Story", fantasy world-building, writing tips, and taking attendee questions. Signing slot to follow at the booth. Ticket admission required.

title: Special Panel: Kristin Hannah
author: Kristin Hannah
description: Catch bestselling author Kristin Hannah on panel at New York Comic Con! Discussing "The Women", fantasy world-building, writing tips, and taking attendee questions. Signing slot to follow at the booth. Ticket admission required.

title: Book Discussion: A Court of Thorns and Roses
bookTitle: A Court of Thorns and Roses
author: Sarah J. Maas
description: Our monthly community book club will gather to discuss "A Court of Thorns and Roses" by Sarah J. Maas. Share your thoughts, analyze the plot, and connect with fellow readers in a cozy, relaxed setting at Books & Books. Refreshments served.

title: Book Discussion: It Ends with Us
author: Colleen Hoover
description: Our monthly community book club will gather to discuss "It Ends with Us" by Colleen Hoover. Share your thoughts, analyze the plot, and connect with fellow readers in a cozy, relaxed setting at Third Place Books (Seward Park) Bookstore. Refreshments served.

title: Book Discussion: The Women
author: Kristin Hannah
description: Our monthly community book club will gather to discuss "The Women" by Kristin Hannah. Share your thoughts, analyze the plot, and connect with fellow readers in a cozy, relaxed setting at Books-A-Million. Refreshments served.

title: Creative Writing Workshop with Michelle Obama
author: Michelle Obama
description: Unlock your writing potential in this interactive workshop led by acclaimed author Michelle Obama. Inspired by the techniques used in "Becoming", we will explore character development, world-building, and pacing. Limited seats available, reservation recommended.
